task_completion.description: Create a custom calculation named 'Profit Status'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a new data element or calculation editor window showing the name 'Profit Status'.

task_completion.description: Implement logic to categorize profit into 'Profitable' and 'Loss'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a formula in the calculation editor (e.g., CASE WHEN Profit >= 0 THEN 'Profitable' ELSE 'Loss' END) or data preview showing these exact labels.

task_completion.description: Create a Stacked Bar Chart with 'Region' and 'Profit Status'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Stacked Bar Chart on the canvas. The grammar/properties panel should show 'Region' on the Category/X-axis and 'Profit Status' on Color.

task_completion.description: Set the chart metric to count of records
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Count' or 'Number of Rows' (or similar record count metric) in the Values/Y-axis section of the grammar panel.

task_completion.description: Apply semantic coloring (Green for Profitable, Red for Loss)
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the chart and its legend: the 'Profitable' segments must be colored green, and the 'Loss' segments must be colored red.

task_completion.description: Set the visualization title to 'Regional Profitability Mix'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Regional Profitability Mix' at the top of the chart visualization.
Look for 'Profit_Status_Analysis' in the application title bar, tab name, or inside a save dialog pointing to the Documents folder.

integrity.description: The agent used the Oracle Analytics Desktop GUI to create the visualization
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Oracle Analytics Desktop interface being actively used, not just terminal commands or text editors.

integrity.description: The chart is genuinely rendered by the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The chart should appear within the application's canvas area with interactive elements visible, not as a static image opened in an image viewer.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI to generate the .dva file via scripts
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be a visual trajectory of adding datasets, creating calculations, and building the chart step-by-step in the UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected workbook filename is 'Profit_Status_Analysis.dva' saved in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\'. The custom calculation must be exactly named 'Profit Status' and output the labels 'Profitable' and 'Loss'. The visualization must be titled 'Regional Profitability Mix'.
